title: Basic html forms to take user inputs

content.problemStatement:
In this problem, we’ll building **To-Do list web page** using **plain HTML and CSS**, styled to look modern and responsive — and then we’ll connect it with our **Flask backend**.

### TASKS:

1. HTML Form to Add a Task \
Write a html form to take the input for tasks and sending request to `/add`. 

2. Displaying Current Tasks \
Should display the given below task as shown in the figure.
